metadata.name: Segment an Email List for a Targeted Send

description: An email marketer wants to send a promotional email to a specific segment of their audience: customers who have purchased in the last 60 days but have not opened the last two emails.

nodes.task_description: Create a list of all customers who made a purchase in the last 60 days.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates the initial list of recent purchasers.

nodes.task_description: Create a second list of all customers who did not open the last two email campaigns.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates the list of unengaged users.

nodes.task_description: Find the intersection of the two lists to create the final target segment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates the final, highly-targeted segment of users.
